pkgmetadata.longdescription: OpenTelemetry Zipkin JSON Exporterpypi.. pypi image httpsbadge.fury.iopyopentelemetry-exporter-zipkin-json.svg target httpspypi.orgprojectopentelemetry-exporter-zipkin-jsonThis library allows export of tracing data to Zipkin httpszipkin.io_ using JSONfor serialization.Installation------------ pip install opentelemetry-exporter-zipkin-jsonReferences---------- OpenTelemetry Zipkin Exporter httpsopentelemetry-python.readthedocs.ioenlatestexporterzipkinzipkin.html_ Zipkin httpszipkin.io_ OpenTelemetry Project httpsopentelemetry.io_
